old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-vprq","title":"Kconfig: NET_ROUTE assignment error when enabling LICHEN_RPL in gateway native_sim build","description":"After adding CONFIG_LICHEN_RPL=y and LORA_LICHEN_GATEWAY_RPL_ROOT, west build fails with 'NET_ROUTE is assigned in a configuration file, but is not directly user-configurable'. {"id":"project-LICHEN-vprq","title":"Kconfig: NET_ROUTE assignment error when enabling LICHEN_RPL in gateway native_sim build","description":"After adding CONFIG_LICHEN_RPL=y and LORA_LICHEN_GATEWAY_RPL_ROOT, west build fails with 'NET_ROUTE is assigned in a configuration file, but is not directly user-configurable'.
